description_long: This is a large, vertically-oriented cylindrical storage tank with a conical roof, constructed primarily from what appears to be corrugated metal panels. The tank is supported by a robust red-painted steel frame with multiple vertical and diagonal supports, elevating it above the ground. A yellow metal access ladder runs up one side of the tank, providing access to the top for maintenance or inspection. The tank's exterior is segmented by horizontal bands, likely for structural reinforcement. The base of the tank narrows into a funnel shape, suggesting it is designed for gravity-fed dispensing of stored materials. The overall design is utilitarian and typical of storage tanks found in agricultural or light industrial urban settings.
description: A tall, cylindrical metal storage tank with a conical roof, red steel support frame, and a yellow access ladder on one side. The tank features horizontal reinforcement bands and a funnel-shaped base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical tank, conical roof, and red steel supports, with the access ladder partially visible behind the tank.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full yellow access ladder running up the tank and the funnel-shaped base supported by the red frame.
description_view_2: Angled view with the access ladder and structural bands clearly visible, emphasizing the tank's verticality and support structure.
description_view_3: Rear view with the access ladder mostly obscured, focusing on the tank's cylindrical body and red support frame.
